content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Pharma (+2.71%), Auto (+0.98%), Metal (+1.08%), Bank Nifty (+0.67%) leading. India VIX softening to 17.42. Most held positions in profit; focus shifts to trailing SLs and protecting gains rather than stacking new entries. Cash already at 46% deployed remaining; book is appropriately positioned.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.5% unrealized; current SL 1030 already above entry 984 (good). Tightening marginally to 1032 (~1.5% below CMP 1049.70) preserves trail-gap discipline (>1% from CMP). Q4 beat thesis intact; let it run toward 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slight recovery to 124.14 (-0.8%). SL 119 (~4% below CMP) is appropriate for an ETF; no MODIFY warranted. Defensive hedge holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1712.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9% unrealized but stock fading off intraday high 1751 to 1729. Current SL 1710 is just above entry 1700; tightening to 1712 (~1% below CMP 1729.20, satisfies trail-gap floor). Q4 beat + FY27 guide intact, but Adani group governance overhang argues for tight trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.0% unrealized. SL 4600 is at entry 4575 + buffer; CMP 4622.60 leaves only ~0.5% trail-gap which is below the 1% floor. Holding existing SL — any further tighten would risk self-stopout on intraday noise. Defence sector bid intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% with stellar Q4 (PAT +124%, margin +875bps), Geojit target 8500. SL 6960 already above entry; CMP 7031 leaves ~1% trail-gap. Holding SL at 6960 (no-op MODIFY avoided — emitting HOLD instead). Correction: HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.5% unrealized. SL 832 is below entry 838 — cannot loosen, can only tighten. CMP 847 vs SL 832 = ~1.8% gap, acceptable. Q4 board meeting pending in May is a binary risk; if results date confirmed in next 3 sessions, will re-evaluate per rule 11. Hold for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9% unrealized but Q4 was strong (+30% PAT, AUM crossed 2L cr). SL 362 (~1.0% below CMP 365.95) intact. Thesis valid; let setup play out toward 388 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% with Q4 beat (revenue +22%). SL 818 vs CMP 821.80 leaves only 0.5% gap — already very tight, below 1% floor. Cannot loosen; holding. If CMP advances I'll trail; if it dips to SL the exit is automatic."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%, post-Q4 gap-up holding. SL 1265 vs CMP 1283 = ~1.4% gap — acceptable. Dividend deferral and Encora dilution concerns are flags but technical setup intact. No MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4% on a +10% session day — defence basket rally. SL 2950 is ~3.5% below CMP 3056.60 (within budget given ATR). Stock is stretched after 48% Apr rally; not tightening yet — letting volatility absorb in normal trading range."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% unrealized; Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%, post-results +9.82% rally consolidating. SL 790 (~1.5% below CMP 802.60) is well-positioned. Thesis intact."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock additional gain; SL ~1.5% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ETF defensive holding; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1712.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten given fade off intraday high; governance overhang argues for tight trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Trail-gap already <1% on current SL; further tighten would risk self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; CMP-SL gap ~1% — at floor. Letting Q4 momentum run toward target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 832 acceptable. Q4 board meeting binary risk — will revisit when date confirmed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 fundamentals; minor drawdown within normal range."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight at 0.5% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Post-gap consolidation; SL above entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stretched post +48% Apr; giving volatility room with original SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print strong; SL well-placed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BIOCON has Q4 board meeting TOMORROW (May 7) — binary event blocks new entry per rule 11. LAURUSLABS at record high post Q4 with dividend ex-date May 8 (gap-down risk) — pass. WOCKPHARMA already +24% — chase risk. Defence cluster (HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE) already at 3 names; per rule 10 cannot add another. Capital goods cluster also crowded. CAMS+ABCAPITAL+PNBHOUSING already give Financial Services exposure. HFCL pending order from earlier — leaving alone per ORDER HYGIENE; will not stack. Book is appropriately positioned; no qualifying new entry that clears bar without violating cluster discipline.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is healthy: 9/11 positions in profit, total unrealized +INR 8,544. Win rate 14% over 5 days is concerning — pattern is too many small premature exits. Today's discipline: emit HOLDs where SL is already optimal rather than micro-adjust (avoiding the BANDHANBNK/BAJFINANCE failure mode). Cash 46% leaves ample dry powder; not forcing deployment given Pharma/Defence/Financial themes are stretched and several names face binary catalysts in next 3 sessions. Will reassess on next pulse for any post-event entries."
}
